reasoning: Experience: 13+ years in software development (exceeds 6+ years requirement). Roles include Fullstack and Staff Engineer positions, showing progression and seniority.

Primary Stack: Strong with Node.js/TypeScript for both frontend (React mentioned) and backend (Nest.js not explicitly mentioned but Node.js/TypeScript are present). Vitest is not listed directly but Jest is implied via testing workshops.
Secondary Technologies: Kotlin/Java are present (used in robotic arms, mobile device orchestration, and investment tools). Python is not listed but not required.
AI Agent Development: Direct experience with MCP (Model Context Protocol) and AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, matching a required skill.
Cloud/Containerization: AWS CDK used at Optilyz; Docker explicitly mentioned; Kubernetes used for GISCollective platform.
Databases: MongoDB (Optilyz), MySQL (GEP SA), PostgreSQL not explicitly listed but SQL is mentioned. Relational/NoSQL exposure is present.
Testing: TDD, CI/CD practices mentioned; Jest implied via workshops; Vitest not explicitly listed but not critical.
Security/Auth: Not explicitly detailed in resume but implied via secure coding practices and enterprise environments.
Communication/Collaboration: Workshops, talks, and open-source contributions demonstrate strong communication and knowledge sharing.
Education: BS in Computer Science meets core qualification.
Weaknesses: Nest.js not explicitly listed; Vitest not mentioned; React experience is implied but not explicitly stated in recent roles.
Scalability/Performance: Experience with low-latency apps (Dlang at Dunnhumby) and high-performance databases indicates capability.
Process Improvement: CI/CD, trunk-based development, and dev-ops infrastructure setup (GitLab, Docker, CI servers) show process maturity.
strengths: 13+ years of full-stack development experience with deep expertise in TypeScript and Node.js.
Direct experience with AI agent infrastructure (MCP, Model Context Protocol) and modern developer tooling.
Strong background in cloud platforms (AWS) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), with proven scalability experience.
concerns: Primary stack includes React but not explicitly listed in recent roles; Vitest testing framework not mentioned.
Nest.js (primary stack requirement) not explicitly listed in recent employment history.
AI agent development experience is present but not extensive in duration (current role at re:cinq since April 2025).
response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates exceptional full-stack experience with 13+ years in software development, including senior and staff roles. She matches the primary stack (TypeScript/Node.js) and has direct experience with AI agent infrastructure (MCP), cloud platforms (AWS), and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes). While Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly listed, her experience with React, Jest, and modern backend frameworks suggests adaptability. Minor gaps in primary stack alignment and testing framework specificity are outweighed by her breadth of experience and technical depth.
